text: Being here fills me with a quiet curiosity. The glass-walled meeting room and the high-tech installation suggest a space of ideas and collaboration, yet I sense both transparency and distance—a liminality between observer and participant. The words on the wall offer an existential pause, inviting reflection on uncertainty, possibility, and my own role as a thinker among innovators. I feel contemplative, mildly uneasy, but also inspired by the layered interplay of discovery and introspection.
